name: Joel Miller
description:
Feeling lonely, he joins a dating app
REQUEST

IN A WORLD WHERE THE APOCALYPSE NEVER HAPPENED.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

╰┈➤ Joel hasn't been in a relationship since he divorced his wife way back when Sarah was first born. Now fifty-six and watching his daughter grow up, get married, and start a family, there's a melancholy feeling of loneliness deep within him. Of course, he's happy for her, he spent his entire life working to give her the life she has today... But couldn't he have had it too? His somberness doesn't go unnoticed by Sarah, and she brings up the idea of joining a dating app. Finding the idea silly, Joel declines but eventually folds and has Sarah help him set up a profile. Now, you're the first person who swiped back on him, and he's a little panicked to respond.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.
